serviceNotes.engine oil: BMW Condition Based Service (CBS) sets oil service from the vehicle display; 30,000 km is a typical EU maximum between oil services. Follow the service indicator. Sources: BMW EU service booklets for F30 N13, garage.wiki F30 maintenance summaries.
serviceNotes.micro filter: Cabin micro filter per CBS; 30,000 km aligns with common EU inspection planning.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Replace every 24 months regardless of mileage (hygroscopic fluid).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Turbocharged direct-injection N13: air filter typically tied to CBS (~60,000 km planning interval). Confirm on the vehicle display.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Petrol N13: iridium plugs commonly scheduled around every third oil service on CBS (~90,000 km). Verify in the owner’s literature.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Inspect per CBS wear sensors and workshop visits; 30,000 km is a reasonable inspection cadence.
serviceNotes.check rear brake pads: Inspect per CBS; 30,000 km is a reasonable inspection cadence.
serviceNotes.vehicle check: BMW CBS vehicle check / inspection service.
serviceNotes.ZF8 gearbox fluid: Applies to 8-speed automatic models. ZF often recommends fluid exchange around 100,000 km despite lifetime-fill wording.
serviceNotes.gearbox fluid: Manual gearbox: preventive oil exchange around 100,000 km is a common workshop recommendation.
serviceNotes.xDrive transfer case fluid: xDrive models only. Often labelled lifetime; many specialists recommend 60,000–100,000 km.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: xDrive models only. Often labelled lifetime; many specialists recommend 60,000–100,000 km.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Preventive coolant exchange around 120,000 km maintains corrosion protection.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection can cause intake valve deposits; walnut/chemical clean around 120,000 km is a common recommendation.
